name: Canon
description: Canon is a Japanese imaging and optics company known for cameras, lenses, and professional imaging systems.

name: Fujifilm
description: Fujifilm is a Japanese company known for cameras, film stocks, and hybrid imaging systems.

name: Sony
description: Sony is a major electronics manufacturer and one of the leading camera brands in the mirrorless segment.

name: Nikon
description: Nikon is a Japanese optics and imaging company known for cameras, lenses, and photographic equipment.

name: Leica
description: Leica is a German premium camera manufacturer known for rangefinders, compact cameras, and distinctive industrial design.

name: Panasonic
description: Panasonic develops Lumix cameras and is active in both hybrid stills and video-oriented camera systems.
